name: View.ViewMarkSymbolAttributes
summary: The ViewMarkSymbolAttributes class contains symbol attributes for view mark tags.

constructors.name: View.ViewMarkSymbolAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new mark symbol attributes instance.

constructors.name: View.ViewMarkSymbolAttributes
constructors.signature: public ViewMarkSymbolAttributes(double size, MarkSymbolShape shape, View.LabelLineLengthType lineLengthType, double lineLength)
constructors.summary: Creates a new mark symbol attributes instance with the given size, shape, line length type and line length.

params.name: size
params.doc: The size of the mark symbol to be used.

params.name: shape
params.doc: The shape of the mark symbol to be used.

params.name: lineLengthType
params.doc: The line length type of the mark symbol to be used.

params.name: lineLength
params.doc: The line length of the mark symbol to be used.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

properties.name: LineLength
properties.summary: The label line length in the case of custom length.

properties.name: Shape
properties.summary: The shape of the mark symbol.

properties.name: Size
properties.summary: The size of the mark symbol.
